description.from: Deals 333(1+0.3Skill Level)+153.2% of Attack Power as Magic Damage 3 times to a random enemy and nearby enemies, stunning them for 1.8 sec.
description.to: Attacks a random enemy and its nearby enemies 3 times, dealing a total of ??? M.DMG and inflicting Stun for 3 sec.

description.from:
Creates [Belladonna Seed] in the area around the target for 7 sec.
[Belladonna Seed]: Deals 403(1+0.3Skill Level)+146.2% of Attack Power as Magic Damage every 1 sec to nearby enemies and reduces their healing received by 25% for 1 sec.
description.to: Creates a Seed of Belladonna around the target for 10 sec. The seed deals ??? M.DMG to nearby enemies every 2 sec, increasing M.DMG the target takes by 30% and reducing Heal Rate by 30% for 5 sec.

description.from: Deals 304(1+0.3Skill Level)+112.2% of Attack Power as Magic Damage 6 time to enemies in a wide area in front and knocks them down for 1.8 sec.
description.to: Attacks enemies within a wide frontal range of self 6 times, dealing a total of ??? M.DMG and knocking them down for 3 sec.

description.from: On Normal and skill attacks, inflicts [Poison] on the target, dealing continuous Magic Damage equal to 100% of Attack Power every 1 sec for 20 sec and reducing their healing received by 5%. This effect stacks up to 5 times.
description.to: Normal and Skill attacks inflicts Poison on a target, dealing a total of ??? continuous M.DMG and reducing Heal Rate by 5% over 20 sec. Poison can be stacked up to max 5 times. If Lorraine dies, Poison effect on enemies will disappear.

dark.from: Mana cost is increased by 1000, but damage dealt is increased by 100%.
dark.to: Recovers own Mana by 250 upon a Critical Hit.

dark.from: Enemies hit suffer increased status ailment duration by 30% for {1} sec.
dark.to: The duration of the CC on hit enemies increases by 30% for 5 sec.

light.from: Mana cost is increased by 1000, but damage dealt is increased by 80%.
light.to: Mana cost is increased by 1 but DMG is boosted by 100%.

dark.from: Mana cost is increased by 1000, but removes beneficial effects from enemies within range.
dark.to: Increases Mana Cost by 1 and dispels positive effects of enemies within range.

dark.from: If the target is a boss, [Poison] damage is increased by 70%.
dark.to: If the target is a boss, increases DMG of Poison by x3.

description.from: [Thornbush Forest] Increases DMG by 50% and reduces Cooldown by {0} sec.
description.to: [Thornbush Forest] Increases DMG by 50% and reduces Cooldown by {0}.

description.from: [Wrath of the Forest] Increases DMG by {0}%. Upon a Crit Hit on enemies with 5 or more stacks of Poison, reduces Cooldown by 4%.
description.to: [Wrath of the Forest] DMG is increased by {0}%. Upon Crit Hit on enemies with over 5 stacks of Poison, skill cooldown is reduced by 4%.

description.from: [Poison] makes Poison effect irremovable and increases DMG dealt to Bosses by {0}%.
description.to: [Poison] Poison effect becomes irremovable and for the duration of Poison, target takes {0}% increased M.DMG

dark.from: At the start of battle, all skill cooldowns are reduced by 30%, and damage dealt to non-hero enemies is increased by 10% for 90 sec. The damage increase stacks up to 5 times and cannot be dispelled.
dark.to: At the beginning of each battle, immediately reduces all Skill Cooldown of self by 30% and increases DMG dealt to Non-Hero enemies by 20% for 90 sec. DMG Boost effect stacks up to max 5 times and is irremovable.

description.from: Every 7 sec, deals Magic Damage equal to {0}% of Attack Power to poisoned enemies, reduces their Magic Defense by {1}% for 10 sec, and increases their Magic Damage taken by {2}%.
description.to: Deals M.DMG equal to {0}% of ATK to enemies inflicted with Poison every 7 secm reducing M.DEF by {1}% and increasing M.DMG the target takes by {2}% for 10 sec.
